title: core: blocking feature does not declare tokio/rt dependency
description: secretx-core/Cargo.toml enables dep:tokio under the blocking feature but specifies no tokio feature flags. tokio::runtime::Builder::new_current_thread() and Handle::try_current() require tokio/rt. If a downstream pulls tokio with only tokio/sync and enables secretx-core/blocking, compilation may fail or silently depend on transitive features. Fix: add features = ["rt"] to the tokio dep under the blocking feature.
